name: Bludgeoning
description: Chance of stunning an enemy when attacking.

name: Counterattack
description: Percentage of your damage dealt as an extra attack when dodging.

name: Critical Chance
description: Chance of dealing a critical strike.

name: Critical Damage
description: Multiplier for the physical damage dealt when striking.

name: Guard
description: Gain Barrier stacks when entering an Area.

name: Lifesteal
description: Restore health for a percentage of the physical damage dealt when attacking.

name: Mana Burst
description: Percentage of your Magic Damage dealt to a random enemy after attacking.

name: Regeneration
description: Restore health at the end of every round and the end of every combat.

name: Swiftness
description: Chance of getting an extra attack when attacking.
